MQueryScript:
let  
    Source = Qvd.Document(File.Contents("..\Data Files\QVDs\Flight Data.qvd")),  
    PromotedHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars = true]),  
    ChangedType = Table.TransformColumnTypes(PromotedHeaders, {  
        {"%Airline ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Carrier Group ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Unique Carrier Code", Text.Type},  
        {"%Unique Carrier Entity Code", Text.Type},  
        {"%Region Code", Text.Type},  
        {"%Origin Airport ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Origin Airport Sequence ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Origin Airport Market ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Origin World Area Code", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Destination Airport ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Destination Airport Sequence ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Destination Airport Market ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Destination World Area Code", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Aircraft Group ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Aircraft Type ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Aircraft Configuration ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Distance Group ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Service Class ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"%Datasource ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"# Departures Scheduled", Int64.Type},  
        {"# Departures Performed", Int64.Type},  
        {"# Payload", Int64.Type},  
        {"Distance", Int64.Type},  
        {"# Available Seats", Int64.Type},  
        {"# Transported Passengers", Int64.Type},  
        {"# Transported Freight", Int64.Type},  
        {"# Transported Mail", Int64.Type},  
        {"# Ramp-To-Ramp Time", Int64.Type},  
        {"# Air Time", Int64.Type},  
        {"Unique Carrier", Text.Type},  
        {"Carrier Code", Text.Type},  
        {"Carrier Name", Text.Type},  
        {"Origin Airport Code", Text.Type},  
        {"Origin City", Text.Type},  
        {"Origin State Code", Text.Type},  
        {"Origin State FIPS", Int64.Type},  
        {"Origin State", Text.Type},  
        {"Origin Country Code", Text.Type},  
        {"Origin Country", Text.Type},  
        {"Destination Airport Code", Text.Type},  
        {"Destination City", Text.Type},  
        {"Destination State Code", Text.Type},  
        {"Destination State FIPS", Int64.Type},  
        {"Destination State", Text.Type},  
        {"Destination Country Code", Text.Type},  
        {"Destination Country", Text.Type},  
        {"Year", Int64.Type},  
        {"Period", Int64.Type},  
        {"Quarter", Int64.Type},  
        {"Month (#)", Int64.Type},  
        {"Month", Text.Type},  
        {"From - To Airport Code", Text.Type},  
        {"From - To Airport ID", Int64.Type},  
        {"From - To City", Text.Type},  
        {"From - To State Code", Text.Type},  
        {"From - To State", Text.Type}  
    })  
in  
    ChangedType

let
    Source = Qvd.Document(File.Contents("..\Data Files\QVDs\Carrier Groups.qvd")),
    CarrierGroups = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars=true])
in
    CarrierGroups

let
    Source = Qvd.Document(File.Contents("..\Data Files\QVDs\Airlines.qvd")),
    Airlines = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars=true])
in
    Airlines

let
    Source = Qvd.Document(File.Contents("..\Data Files\QVDs\Carrier Operating Region.qvd")),
    CarrierOperatingRegion = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars=true])
in
    CarrierOperatingRegion

let
    Source = Qvd.Document(File.Contents("..\Data Files\QVDs\Flight Types.qvd")),
    FlightTypes = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars=true])
in
    FlightTypes

let  
    Source = Qvd.Document(File.Contents("..\Data Files\QVDs\Aircraft Groups.qvd")),  
    PromotedHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars=true]),  
    RenamedColumns = Table.RenameColumns(PromotedHeaders, {{"%Aircraft Group ID", "Aircraft Group ID"}, {"Aircraft Group", "Aircraft Group"}})  
in  
    RenamedColumns

let  
    Source = Qvd.Document(File.Contents("..\Data Files\QVDs\Aircraft Types.qvd")),  
    PromotedHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars=true]),  
    RenamedColumns = Table.RenameColumns(PromotedHeaders, {{"%Aircraft Type ID", "Aircraft Type ID"}, {"Aircraft Type", "Aircraft Type"}})  
in  
    RenamedColumns

let
    Source = Qvd.Document(File.Contents("..\Data Files\QVDs\Distance Groups.qvd")),
    DistanceGroups = Source{[Name = "Table"]}[Content],
    PromotedHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(DistanceGroups, [PromoteAllScalars = true]),
    RenamedColumns = Table.RenameColumns(PromotedHeaders, {{"%Distance Group ID", "Distance Group ID"}, {"Distance Interval", "Distance Interval"}})
in
    RenamedColumns
